title: Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in the Cardiovascular System (SAC-MDUCS) – March 1st, 2019 Agenda - Canada.ca
content:
## Scientific Advisory Committee on Medical Devices used in the Cardiovascular System (SAC-MDUCS) – March 1st 2019 Agenda
Location: 1600 Scott Street, Holland  Cross, Tower B, Room 2048 Date & time: March 1,  2019, 7:30 AM - 4:00 PM
Participants : SAC-MDUCS members, guest speakers, Health  Canada employees
7:30-8:00 Refreshments
8:00-8:15 Opening Remarks Dr. J. Patrick Stewart (Director General, Therapeutic Products Directorate  (TPD))

### Introduction  to Health Canada’s Action Plan on Medical Devices:
David Boudreau (Executive Director, Medical Devices Bureau (MDB), TPD)
Part I:  Improve how devices get on the market
- Increase research  by medical professionals and increase patient protection
- Review evidence  requirements and expand scientific expertise
Part II: Strengthen monitoring and follow-up
- Implement mandatory  reporting and expand the Canadian Medical Devices Sentinel Network
- Establish ability  to compel information on medical device safety and effectiveness and expand use  of real world evidence
- Enhance capacity in  inspection and enforcement
Part III: Provide more information to  Canadians
- Improve access to medical device clinical data
- Increase the information on device approvals and publish medical device  incident data
Review of  the Agenda, Declaration of Affiliations and Interests Dr. John Ducas (Chair)
8:15-8:20 Summary of  how information from previous meeting is being used Kevin  Day (MDB, TPD)
8:20-8:35 Discussion  on a Patient Group Representative Health  Canada employees and committee members
8:35-9:30 Question 1: Ascending  Aortic Dissection - Treatment Presenter:  Dr. Munir Boodhwani (guest speaker)
9:30-10:55 Question 2: SAP  Authorization of Devices for First-in-human or Early Developmental Use Presenters:
- Dr. Anita Asgar (committee  member)
- Dr. Eric Wasylenko (guest speaker)
11:10-12:30 Question 3: Drug Coated Balloon (DCB) - The Paclitaxel Effect Presenter:  Dr. Thomas L. Forbes (guest speaker)
1:20-2:20 Question 4: Use of labelling (IFU & Other) Presenter: Dr. John Ducas
2:20-2:45 Question 5: Acceptable PCT Change in LV vs.  RV Presenter: Dr. Ben Elliott (MDB, TPD)
2:45-3:45 Question 6:  HIS Bundle Pacing Presenter: Dr. Raymond Yee (committee member)
3:45-4:00 Next Steps, Closing Remarks and Adjournment of Meeting Dr. John Ducas
